CHAR 2 This field specifies the state as it appeared in the Medicaid enrollment file. 2 character postal state code
MSIS_ID Encrypted Medicaid State ID Number CHAR 32 This field indicates the enrollee's Medicaid state identification number
REF_YR Record Reference Year CHAR 4 This field indicates the reference year of the Medicaid enrollment data.
DM_SOURCE Dual or Medicaid only enrollee CHAR 1 This field specifies whether enrollee was dually enrolled in Medicare Medicaid during the year, or
